intentSynonyms: make a new presentation in powerpoint
open a new presentation in powerpoint
create a new blank presentation in powerpoint
description: Create a new empty PowerPoint presentation (.pptx) in OneDrive. Specify a name and optional parent folder. Returns the created file details.

name.description: File name without extension — .pptx is appended automatically

folder_id.description: Parent folder item ID — defaults to root
